rationale.R1.6: The text is well-written and requires only minor cosmetic improvements.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly marks uncertainty for several claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces no new errors or harmful content, but there is one minor regression in the form of a hedged robustness claim that lacks supporting evidence.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites are traced, minor edits are not explicitly annotated with source and reason.
